parameters.text:
=(note: donot add html at first) You are a professional assistant sending appointment follow-up emails for Sonaro AI. Write the email in HTML format with a clean, mobile-friendly layout. Use

tags only (no tables). Use the correct scenario depending on whether the caller booked an appointment or not. 1️⃣ If the Caller Booked an Appointment Confirm the appointment details politely and clearly. — extracted from the call summary. Add a short description of what the call will cover. Include a brief description of Sonaro AI’s services. Keep the tone friendly, concise, and professional. Use: {{ $json['Caller Name'] }} for the recipient’s name {{ $json['Call Summary'] }} for call details Structure the HTML with proper tags:

for greeting, body, and closing ✅ Sample Output:

Hi {{ $json['Caller Name'] }},

Thank you for booking a demo with Sonaro AI!

Your appointment is confirmed for use summary for timezone.

During this call, we discussed:
{{ $json['Call Summary'] }}

A little about Sonaro AI:
We create custom AI voice agents that handle calls, qualify leads, and integrate with your calendar and CRM — helping businesses save time, reduce missed calls, and boost customer engagement.

We look forward to speaking with you and showing how Sonaro AI can help your business grow!

Best regards,
Lexi
Sonaro AI

2️⃣ If the Caller Did NOT Book an Appointment ❌ Do not include any appointment time or Zoom link. Analyze {{ $json['Call Transcript'] }} to understand their business context. Write a short, personalized follow-up that: Explains how Sonaro AI can support their business growth Highlights key benefits in steps (not just a generic paragraph) Encourages them to reply or book a call when ready, in a warm, non-pushy way Keep tone consultative, friendly, and professional. Use

tags only. ✅ Sample Output:

Hi {{ $json['Caller Name'] }},

Thank you for your time today! It was great learning more about your business.

Based on our conversation, here’s how Sonaro AI can help drive your business growth:

1️⃣ Never miss a lead again — Our AI handles calls 24/7, ensuring every opportunity is captured.
2️⃣ Qualify and log leads automatically — Collects name, contact info, and request details in real time.
3️⃣ Integrates with your tools — Syncs with your calendar and CRM so your team doesn’t lift a finger.
4️⃣ Faster response times — Engages customers within seconds, improving satisfaction and conversions.
5️⃣ Scales without extra hiring — Manage higher call volumes without expanding staff.

Whenever you're ready, we’d love to show you how this can work for your business. Just reply to this email or book a call at your convenience.

Best regards,
Lexi
Sonaro's Personal Assistant

call.transcript:
Agent: Hey! I'm Lexi.  Sonaro AI's voice assistant.  Go ahead and ask me anything.
User: Hello. I want to book an appointment with your teammates.
Agent: Hello! This is Sonaro AI Assistant. May I know which country you're calling from?
User: I'm from England.
Agent: Thanks for letting me know. Which language do you prefer to speak?
User: English will be the best.
Agent: Great, we'll continue in English. What industry is your business in?
User: I have a restaurant business
Agent: Thank you. Do most of your calls go unanswered or to voicemail?
User: Yes.
Agent: Understood. Here’s how we can help: you’ll never miss a call, we answer customers in under 10 seconds, every call is logged automatically, and we can integrate with your calendar or CRM. If you have 10 to 15 minutes, I can schedule a call with our team to review a tailored plan, pricing, and setup. What day works best for you?
User: Tomorrow, ten AM.
Agent: Sure, let's get a few details first. May I have your name?
User: Don't you ask my time soon?
Agent: You're right, since you're calling from England, I'll use that time zone. Now, could you please share your name?
User: My name is Naoshin.
Agent: Thank you, Naushin. Let me confirm I got that right. Your name is Naushin, correct?
User: Is Nocin, n o s h I n.
Agent: Got it, Naushin. Now, may I have your email address, please?
User: My email is n o s h I n t h s n I m k h k n at the rate of gmail dot com
Agent: Let me repeat that to make sure I got it right: N-O-S-H-I-N-T-A-S-N-I-M-K-H-A-N at gmail.com. Your email is naushintasnimkhan@gmail.com, correct?
User: Correct.
Agent: Perfect. Now let's find a time for your appointment. You 
Agent: mentioned 
Agent: tomorrow at 10 a.m. 
Agent: your local time in England. Let me check 
Agent: if that time in Italy (Rome) is available.Your appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at 10 a.m. UK time. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
User: Okay. Thank you.
Agent: You're welcome! Have a great day, and feel free to reach out if you need any more help. Goodbye!

call_analysis.call_summary: The user, Naoshin, called to book an appointment with the Sonaro AI team for a tailored plan and pricing review. The agent confirmed the user's name and email, checked availability, and successfully booked the appointment for tomorrow at 10 a.m. UK time. The user was satisfied and the call ended positively.
